---
name: Skill Request
about: Suggest a new skill or profile for obsidian-harness
title: "[Skill] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Skill name

What should the skill be called?

## Problem it solves

What workflow or pain point does this skill address?

## Proposed behavior

Describe how the skill should work. Include:
- Trigger phrases (when Claude should activate it)
- Key workflows
- Dependencies on other skills (if any)

## Profile

Which profile(s) should this skill belong to?
- [ ] core (all profiles)
- [ ] daily
- [ ] project
- [ ] New module: ___

## References

Links to similar skills or inspiration (e.g., from awesome-openclaw-skills).
